calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Pro Tem Susan Lew, Clerk: V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Bryce
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff Diane Gerber
Defendant Alexander Sanchez present in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement by Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of Action with Prejudice.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 2085 Sacramento Street, Apt. 403, San Francisco. Writ of execution is stayed if Defendant vacates the premises by May 1, 2004 and pays Plaintiff the sum of $2,500.00 by July 1, 2004 for past due rent and per diem damages through April 30, 2004. Plaintiff waives the other $2,500.00 back rent and daily damages. Plaintiff waives attorney fees and costs in return for retention of Defendant's $400.00 security deposit, $100.00 cleaning deposit and $1,250.00 last month's rent. If Defendant is more than 5 days late in payment of the $2,500.00 owed, Plaintiff shall, by ex parte application and declaration to the court, and 24-hour telephonic notice to Defendant at (415-994-3901), obtain Judgment for all rents and per diem damages due in addition to reasonable attorney fees of $500.00. Defendant waives right to stay of eviction, to move for new trial or appeal of Judgment entered. Any personal property left remaining at the premises shall be deemed abandoned. Rental agreement is declared void and forfeited. The parties agree to mutual release from all claims. All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2004 Advanced From Apr-12-04 To Mar-30-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Text Ruling
